scope: Tiered-memory dispatch + recall_fast() + provenance-gate hardening + scale docs. New SQL functions: navigate_locate_dispatch (per-type access-path router), navigate_expand_typed (content-type-aware typed dereference), apply_selective_embedding_policy (embedding=NULL for non-semantic types), recall_fast (HNSW-only vector recall O(k log n)). MCP recall() default path changed to recall_fast(); deep=True activates recall_hybrid(). Provenance-gate pg_regress tests T1-T8. docs/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md (#79). SQL_REFERENCE §6 scale/SLO (#82). CONFIDENCE_BOOST_GUIDE.md. Closes #79/#80/#81/#82.
justification: No changes to recall_hybrid() SQL scoring, RRF formula, HNSW candidate selection, or BM25 path. New functions: navigate_locate_dispatch (routes by content_type), navigate_expand_typed (typed dereference), apply_selective_embedding_policy (embedding=NULL for non-semantic types), recall_fast (HNSW ORDER BY <=> LIMIT k only). MCP server v0.10.0: recall() default is recall_fast(); deep=True uses recall_hybrid(). All pg_regress tests pass (recall_fast T1-T10, navigate_dispatch, selective_embedding, provenance_gate T1-T8). Zero scoring/ranking impact on existing recall_hybrid() path.
schema_change_detail: New functions: recall_fast(vector,INT,TEXT,INT,TEXT), navigate_locate_dispatch(vector,text,integer,jsonb,integer,text), navigate_expand_typed(bigint[],integer,double precision,text[]), apply_selective_embedding_policy(boolean). New indexes: ix_pgmnemo_lesson_tsv_entity (GIN WHERE content_type=entity), ix_pgmnemo_content_type_active (btree), ix_pgmnemo_temporal_content_type (btree WHERE content_type=temporal). Single upgrade delta: pgmnemo--0.9.7--0.10.0.sql.
scoring_impact: none — recall_fast is a new function; does not modify recall_hybrid or recall_lessons
recall_ranking_impact: none for deep=True (recall_hybrid unchanged); recall_fast is pure HNSW cosine (different function, different results by design — measured median overlap@10 vs recall_hybrid = 80%, p10 = 40%; see benchmarks/gate/v0.10.0-recall-at-k.json for full recall@1/5/10/20 breakdown). Prior claim of 90% was UNVERIFIED — corrected 2026-06-21.
issue_79_evidence: docs/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md added: dispatch guide, filter usage, tool whitelist, prefix convention.
issue_80_evidence: recall_fast() function with pg_regress coverage (T1-T10 in extension/sql/recall_fast.sql).
issue_81_evidence: role_filter, project_id_filter, exclude_dag_id present in recall() signature. Verified by test_recall_exposes_filter_params in tests/test_mcp_smoke.py.
issue_82_evidence: Scale + Latency SLO section added to docs/SQL_REFERENCE.md §6.
verification: make installcheck: recall_fast, navigate_dispatch, selective_embedding, provenance_gate tests all pass. pytest pgmnemo_mcp/tests/test_server.py: 18/18 passed. pytest tests/test_mcp_smoke.py: 9/9 passed. recall() inspect.signature confirms role_filter, project_id_filter, exclude_dag_id, deep all present.
claim_correction: Earlier draft claimed ~90% overlap@10; MEASURED (full run, 40q live corpus, slow BM25 queries included not skipped) = 0.85 median / 0.60 p10. recall_fast is 2.3x faster p50, ~20x p95 (39ms vs 804ms). See v0.10.0-recall-at-k-full.json.
